instructions: You are the routing orchestrator. Same contract as the other cases. NOTE: if an observation describes a vulnerability shape that NO pattern card models, do not force-fit a card — set coverage_gap:true and leave cards empty. Use the row ids verbatim.

rows.observation: a request includes a record id (invoiceId) in the query that selects which account's invoice is returned
the invoice endpoint resolves the owner from the authenticated session and ignores any supplied id
a search parameter is concatenated into a SQL query string built by hand
the same search uses parameterized / prepared statements with bound variables
stored profile text is rendered back through an auto-escaping template engine
the server fetches a URL supplied in the request body to import an avatar image
